data.title: CZ Targeted by ‘Government-Backed’ Hackers – Is North Korea’s Lazarus Group Behind It?
data.description:
Binance co-founder Changpeng Zhao has received a Google warning about possible government-backed hacking attempts linked to North Korea’s Lazarus Group, known for major crypto breaches.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/cz-targeted-by-government-backed-hackers-is-north-koreas-lazarus-group-behind-it/

data.title: Whale Shorts $900M in Bitcoin Ahead of Trump Tariff Shock and Market Drop
data.description:
According to Onchain Lens, the whale opened nearly $900 million in leveraged short positions split between Bitcoin (BTC) and Ethereum […] The post Whale Shorts $900M in Bitcoin Ahead of Trump Tariff Shock and Market Drop appeared first on Coindoo.
source: https://coindoo.com/whale-shorts-900m-in-bitcoin-ahead-of-trump-tariff-shock-and-market-drop/

data.title: Trump mulls pardon for Binance founder Changpeng Zhao amid concerns over optics: Fox News
data.description:
In May, CZ said on a podcast he applied for a pardon from President Trump following his release from prison last year.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/374241/trump-mulls-pardon-binance-changpeng-zhao-concerns-over-optics-report?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Wall Street Banks Unite to Launch Stablecoin Rivaling Tether and Circle
data.description:
Nine global banking giants including Goldman Sachs, Deutsche Bank, Bank of America, and Citigroup announced plans to develop a jointly-backed stablecoin focused on G7 currencies as Bloomberg Intelligence projects the technology could process over $50 trillion in annual payments by 2030.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/wall-street-banks-unite-to-launch-stablecoin-rivaling-tether-and-circle/

data.title: Ethereum Foundation makes new cash commitment to Tornado Cash developers
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation has joined forces with Keyring network to fund the legal defense of Tornado Cash developers Roman Storm and Alexey Pertsev. Under the initiative, proceeds from Keyring’s zkVerified vaults, a yield-generating product on the Ethereum mainnet, would be directed toward the defense of the two developers. For the next two months, 100% of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ethereum-foundation-commit-to-tornado-cash/
